description: Style Noteboss' Pure Purple comes in a delectable light violet flacon and is a fruity floral fragrance first launched in 2006. The design credits for the bottle go to Lutz Herrman.Product DetailsThe top notes are nectarine and white cyclamen; the middle notes are black violet flowers, while the bottom notes introduce marzipan, amber and leather accords.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
